title: Final Mini Software Project
summary: Deliver a small working software project with documentation, testing notes, and release notes.
studentInstructions: Build or finalize a small software project based on your requirements.
Include a README explaining what it does and how to run it.
Include source files or a clear project folder.
Include release notes describing what works and what is limited.
Include testing evidence or a testing summary.

rubric.description: The project delivers a small but coherent set of working features.
The final project reflects the earlier requirements and scope.
The project files are organized and reasonably maintainable.
The submission includes evidence of testing and awareness of limitations.
README and release notes make the project understandable to another person.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment specification and rubric.
Check required files before grading quality.
Write clear feedback and deeper notes.
